summary: Comprehensive testing completed for TruVant car dealer website premium redesign. All features tested: Inventory page with dark header and filters, Car Detail page with specs/features/CTA buttons, Contact page with colored info cards, Mobile bottom bar with Call/WhatsApp buttons. Backend APIs 100% pass rate (18/18 tests). Frontend 100% functional.

issues: Filter button not visible on mobile inventory page - MobileBottomBar component expects onFilterClick prop but it's not passed from App.js. However, InventoryPage has its own mobile filter button that works correctly.

passed_tests: Inventory page dark header with 'Our Inventory' title (orange accent)
Inventory page search filter works (search by make/model)
Inventory page fuel type filter works (Petrol/Diesel/CNG/Electric)
Inventory page transmission filter works (Manual/Automatic)
Inventory page price range filter works (5 price brackets)
Inventory page shows correct car count after filtering
Car Detail page shows car image with FEATURED badge
Car Detail page shows car title, price in orange
Car Detail page shows specs cards (Year, KM Driven, Fuel Type, Transmission)
Car Detail page shows trust badges (Verified, Owner count, RTO)
Car Detail page shows features list with checkmarks
Car Detail page 'Get A Call Back' button opens form
Car Detail page callback form submission works successfully
Car Detail page WhatsApp button links to correct number (918683996996)
Car Detail page Call Now button present
Car Detail page Back to Inventory button works
Contact page dark header with 'Get In Touch' title (orange accent)
Contact page colored info cards (Address-orange, Phone-green, Email-blue, Hours-purple)
Contact page 'Need Immediate Help?' dark section present
Contact page form submission works successfully
Contact page WhatsApp button links to correct number (918683996996)
Contact page Google Maps embed present
Mobile bottom bar visible on Home page (Call, WhatsApp buttons)
Mobile bottom bar visible on Inventory page (Call, WhatsApp buttons)
Mobile bottom bar visible on Contact page (Call, WhatsApp buttons)
Mobile WhatsApp button links to correct number (918683996996)
Navigation between Home, Inventory, Contact pages works
Navigation to Car Detail page via View Details button works
Back button on Car Detail page returns to Inventory
Backend API: GET /api/cars returns car list
Backend API: GET /api/cars?featured=true returns featured cars only
Backend API: GET /api/cars/{id} returns car details
Backend API: POST /api/callback-requests creates callback with car details
Backend API: POST /api/enquiries creates contact enquiry
Backend API: Admin authentication works
critical_code_review_comments: MobileBottomBar filter button requires onFilterClick prop to be passed from App.js - currently not connected. The InventoryPage has its own mobile filter button that works, so this is a minor enhancement opportunity.
Email notifications for callbacks require RESEND_API_KEY configuration - currently MOCKED (logged only, not sent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All TruVant redesign features verified: Inventory page (dark header, sticky filters), Car Detail page (gallery, specs cards, trust badges, callback form), Contact page (colored info cards, dark help section). Mobile bottom bar working on all pages. WhatsApp number 918683996996 verified across all buttons. Email notifications are MOCKED (require RESEND_API_KEY).

mocked_apis_list: Email notifications for callbacks require RESEND_API_KEY - currently logged only, not sent
